channel.title: Joomla! Project — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Joomla! Project (joomla).

item.title: CVE-2026-63264 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomshopping.com - Reflective XSS in JoomShopping < 5.9.3
item.description: The Joomla extension JoomShopping is vulnerable to an reflected XSS vulnerability in the product frontend controller.

item.title: CVE-2026-62415 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomdonation.com - Insecure default configuration Membership Pro < 4.6.2
item.description: The Joomla extension Membership Pro prior version 4.6.2 did by default allow unauthenticated users to upload media assets.

item.title: CVE-2026-61425 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Joomla Extension - balbooa.com - Authentication bypass in Gridbox < 1.6.0
item.description: The Joomla extension Gridbox is vulnerable an authenticated bypass, potentially leading to full admin access.

item.title: CVE-2026-61424 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - dj-extensions.com - Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload in DJ-Classifieds < 3.11.2
item.description: The Joomla extension DJ-Classifieds is vulnerable to an unauthenticated file upload, leading to full RCE.

item.title: CVE-2026-62414 — Joomla Extension - joomlack.fr - Improper access control in Page Builder CK < 3.6.2
item.description: The Joomla extension Page Builder CK does not properly apply access control to frontend page list views.

item.title: CVE-2026-61900 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - dj-extensions.com - Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload in DJ-jDownloads < 4.1.6
item.description: The Joomla extension JDownloads is vulnerable to an unauthenticated file upload, leading to full RCE.

item.title: CVE-2026-61901 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - hikashop.com - Open redirect in Hikashop < 6.5.2
item.description: The Joomla extension Hikashop is vulnerable to an open redirect.

item.title: CVE-2026-60027 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Unauthenticated path traversal / file read in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1
item.description: The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to a unauthenticated path traversal via form elements. Unauthenticated users frontend users are allowed traversal paths and read arbitrary files. Requires a published page with a Form element.

item.title: CVE-2026-60031 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Information disclosure in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1
item.description: The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to an information disclosure. Raw exceptions reflected in AJAX handler responses.

item.title: CVE-2026-60029 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated stored XSS in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1
item.description: The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to an authenticated stored XSS vulnerability. Authenticated builder users could break out of id/class fields that render for public users.

item.title: CVE-2026-60026 · 8.9 HIGH — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated PHP code execution in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1
item.description: The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to an authenticated PHP code execution. Authenticated builder user (core.create/core.edit) could inject PHP tags in element content, that got executed via view-cache include(). Requires caching…

item.title: CVE-2026-60034 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated stored XSS in JMedia Extension < 1.6.0
item.description: The Joomla extension JMedia is vulnerable to a stored XSS vulnerability. Unsanitised SVG uploads served without nosniff, leading to stored/reflected XSS.

item.title: CVE-2026-60030 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Broken Access Control for media management in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1
item.description: The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to an improper access control. Authenticated users could upload media files regardless of their media management permissions.

item.title: CVE-2026-60033 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - SSRF via remote download in JMedia Extension < 1.6.0
item.description: The Joomla extension JMedia is vulnerable to an SSRF vulnerability. Remote-URL download could target internal/reserved addresses.

item.title: CVE-2026-60032 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated arbitrary file upload in JMedia < 1.6.0
item.description: The Joomla extension JMedia is vulnerable to an authenticated arbitrary file upload, leading to RCE. Executable uploads/writes possible (incl. polyglot filenames); chmod didn't strip execute bits.

item.title: CVE-2026-60028 · 8.6 HIGH — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Authenticated stored XSS in Quix Page Builder < 6.2.1
item.description: The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to an authenticated stored XSS vulnerability. Authenticated builder user could inject scripts, fires for any visitor or admin viewing the page. Unescaped output + unsanitised SVG.

item.title: CVE-2026-58148 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - chronoengine.com - Stored XSS in ChronoForms extension for Joomla 8.0 - 8.0.52
item.description: The Joomla extension ChronoForms is vulnerable to an unauthenticated stored XSS vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-60024 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomdonation.com - Insecure default configuration Events Booking < 5.8.0
item.description: The Joomla extension Events Booking prior version 5.8.0 did by default allow unauthenticated users to upload media assets.

item.title: CVE-2026-58149 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomdonation.com - User enumeration in Events Booking < 5.8.0
item.description: The Joomla extension Events Booking is vulnerable to an unauthenticated user enumeration that allows to retrieve account usernames and email addresses.

item.title: CVE-2026-60025 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomdonation.com - User enumeration in Events Booking < 5.8.0
item.description: The Joomla extension Events Booking prior version 5.8.0 had an frontend file upload endpoint that lacked CSRF protection.

item.title: CVE-2026-58078 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - themexpert.com - Unauthenticated SQL injection in Quix Page Builder Pro < 6.2.1
item.description: The Joomla extension Quix Page Builder Pro is vulnerable to an unauthenticated SQL injection.

item.title: CVE-2026-58077 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - weeblr.com - Unauthenticated stored XSS in 4Analytics < 5.0.2
item.description: The Joomla extension 4Analytics is vulnerable to an unauthenticated stored XSS. A specially crafted unauthenticated request may result in website takeover under some circumstances.

item.title: CVE-2026-57833 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - weeblr.com - Unauthenticated stored XSS in 4Analytics < 5.0.2
item.description: The Joomla extension 4Analytics is vulnerable to an unauthenticated stored XSS in relation to the AI analysis feature.

item.title: CVE-2026-57832 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomdonation.com - Unauthenticated blind SQL injection in EDocman < 3.9
item.description: The Joomla extension EDocman is vulnerable to an unauthenticated SQL injection.

item.title: CVE-2026-57831 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - digital-peak.com - Unauthenticated blind SQL injection in DP Calendar 8.18.0 - 10.11.2
item.description: The Joomla extension DP Calendar is vulnerable to an unauthenticated SQL injection.

item.title: CVE-2026-57830 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomshaper.com - Unauthenticated arbitrary file deletion in Helix Ultimate < 2.2.7
item.description: The Joomla extension Helix Ultimate is vulnerable to an unauthenticated arbitrary file deletion.

item.title: CVE-2026-57829 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomshaper.com - Unauthenticated stored XSS in Helix Ultimate < 2.2.7
item.description: The Joomla extension Helix Ultimate is vulnerable to an unauthenticated stored XSS.

item.title: CVE-2026-57827 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - rsjoomla.com - Unauthenticated file upload in RSFiles component < 1.17.12
item.description: The Joomla extension RSFiles is vulnerable to an unauthenticated arbitrary file upload that allows uploading executable files and leads to full RCE.

item.title: CVE-2026-57828 · 9 CRITICAL — Joomla Extension - phoca.cz - Authenticated file upload in RSFiles component < 6.1.3
item.description: The Joomla extension Phoca Downloads is vulnerable to an authenticated arbitrary file upload that allows registered users uploading executable files and leads to full RCE.

item.title: CVE-2026-56292 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - acymailing.com - SQL Injection in AcyMailing extension < 10.11.1
item.description: A SQLi vulnerability in AcyMailing component < 10.11.1 for Joomla was discovered. Exploiting this flaw can lead to unauthorized database access and data leakage.

item.title: CVE-2026-56291 · 10 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - balbooa.com - Unauthenticated file upload in Balbooa Forms extension < 2.4.1
item.description: The Joomla extension Balbooa Forms is vulnerable to an unauthenticated arbitrary file upload that allows uploading executable files and leads to full RCE.

item.title: CVE-2026-48952 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260706] - XSS in com_installer
item.description: Lack of escaping leads to an XSS vulnerability in the update list view of com_installer.

item.title: CVE-2026-48947 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260701] - Incorrect Access Control in com_media webservice endpoints
item.description: An improper access check allows privileged users to overwrite media files without editing permissions.

item.title: CVE-2026-48958 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260712] - Incorrect Access Control in com_fields webservice endpoints
item.description: An improper access check allows unauthorized users to create custom fields via webservices endpoints.

item.title: CVE-2026-48950 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260704] - XSS in com_templates
item.description: Lack of escaping leads to an XSS vulnerability in the file management view of com_templates.

item.title: CVE-2026-48955 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260709] - Incorrect Access Control in com_workflow
item.description: An improper access check allows unauthorized users to access workflow stage and transition information.

item.title: CVE-2026-48956 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260710] - Incorrect Access Control in com_modules
item.description: An improper access check allows users to display a list of modules in the frontend.

item.title: CVE-2026-48957 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260711] - Incorrect Access Control in com_privacy webservice endpoints
item.description: An improper access check allows unauthorized users to access com_privacy datasets.

item.title: CVE-2026-48951 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260705] - XSS in various modalreturn layouts
item.description: Lack of escaping leads to XSS vulnerabilities in modalreturn layouts of various components.

item.title: CVE-2026-48953 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260707] - XSS in the generic image output layout
item.description: Lack of escaping leads to an XSS vulnerability in the generic image output layout.

item.title: CVE-2026-48948 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260702] - Incorrect Access Control in com_contact vcf download
item.description: An improper access check allows user to download vcard exports of com_contact contacts that are inaccessible.

item.title: CVE-2026-48949 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260703] - XSS in MFA method management
item.description: Lack of validation leads to an XSS vulnerability in the MFA management views.

item.title: CVE-2026-48954 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Joomla! Core - [20260708] - XSS through language overrides
item.description: Improper validation leads to a generic XSS vector in the language override feature.

item.title: CVE-2026-49049 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomshaper.com - Unauthenticated access to Helix3 template ajax handler
item.description: The Helix3 plugin for Joomla exposes an ajax handler task, that allows unauthenticated attackers to delete arbitrary files, write arbitrary JSON files and update template parameters.

item.title: CVE-2026-56290 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomlack.fr - Unauthenticated file upload in Page Builder CK extension < 3.6.0
item.description: The Joomla extension Page Builder CK is vulnerable to an unauthenticated arbitrary file upload that allows uploading executable files and leads to full RCE.

item.title: CVE-2026-49048 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - joomcoder.com - Unauthenticated SQL Injection in JoomCCK extension for Joomla < 6.4.1
item.description: The Joomla extension JoomCCK exposes a front-end controller task, that builds two SQL statements by directly concatenating a user-supplied request parameter into the query string without escaping or parameterisation.

item.title: CVE-2026-48945 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - getk2.org - Privileged RCE vulnerability in K2 extension for Joomla < 2.26
item.description: The K2 article gallery upload path accepts a zip/tar archive, extracts it under `/media/k2/galleries/<id>/`, and only renames image files (gif/jpg/jpeg/png/webp) to safe names — non-image files (including `.php`) are extracted as-is and remain execut…

item.title: CVE-2026-48940 · 3.4 LOW — Joomla Extension - getk2.org - Stored-XSS in K2 extension for Joomla < 2.26
item.description: A Joomla user with K2 "create item" rights (Author tier by default) can submit an article whose `embedVideo` POST field contains a raw `<script>` tag; K2 stores it verbatim and renders it unescaped to any visitor of the article page.

item.title: CVE-2026-48941 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Joomla Extension - getk2.org - Unauthenticated folder delete in K2 extension for Joomla < 2.26
item.description: The K2 frontend `item.checkin` task accepts an unauthenticated `sigProFolder` query parameter and uses it directly to address a `JFolder::delete()` call under `/media/k2/galleries/`

item.title: CVE-2026-48946 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Joomla Extension - getk2.org - Privileged RCE vulnerability in K2 extension for Joomla < 2.26
item.description: The K2 frontend article-attachment upload path accepts files whose extension is `.php`, and Apache's standard mod_php matches `\.php$` and executes them under the K2 web user. A K2 Author can upload a `shell.php`, then fetch `/media/k2/attachments/sh…
